creator: mark@grondar.za
text:
Any attempt to log into a pleb user's account with kerberos active does
not work on a NIS/Kerberos client. The only way to log in is to use the
Kerberos password. (I thought that was fixed?)

Fix: 

Dunno.
How-To-Repeat: 
Set up Kerberos and YP on a client, and try to log in as a YP user. Only
the Kerberos password will work on the client.
